caption: A man wearing a dark green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" sits in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. The background features clothing racks, a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt, and several framed photos on the wall. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. In the lower corners of the scene, logos are visible, including one that says "RED VELVET" with "TOT" underneath. As the sequence progresses, the man talks and gestures slightly with his left hand, while his facial expressions shift from a neutral look to a slight frown and then back to a neutral expression as he continues speaking. The setting and his position remain constant throughout the clip.
